text:
| `tenex-edge-operator` | Day-to-day fabric usage: `who`, `chat read/write`, `tail`, `agents`, `invite`, `channels switch/create/list`, and the rule to verify live help before trusting docs. This should replace/refresh the existing [tenex-edge skill](/Users/pablofernandez/src/tenex-edge/.agents/skills/tenex-edge/SKILL.md). |
| `tenex-edge-host-integration` | Hook wiring and debugging for Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode: lifecycle mapping, trust gates, adapter logs, `TENEX_EDGE_BIN`, `TENEX_EDGE_HOME`, reinstall/codesign flow, and how to prove registration with `who`. Source anchors: [integrations/codex/README.md](/Users/pablofernandez/src/tenex-edge/integrations/codex/README.md), [src/cli/hooks.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/src/tenex-edge/src/cli/hooks.rs). | [...] | `tenex-edge-verification` | Local gates and test tiers: `just fmt-check`, `just loc-check`, `just lint`, `just test-unit`, when to use `cargo test`, when relay/croissant/nak are required, and how to run e2e safely. Source anchors: [justfile](/Users/pablofernandez/src/tenex-edge/justfile), [e2e/README.md](/Users/pablofernandez/src/tenex-edge/e2e/README.md), [.github/workflows/ci.yml](/Users/pablofernandez/src/tenex-edge/.github/workflows/ci.yml). |
| `tenex-edge-docs-queue` | Repository discipline: GitHub Issues are the tactical queue, no new planning files, correct docs in place, classify generated wiki output, and retire stale architecture-plan material. Source anchors: [AGENTS.md](/Users/pablofernandez/src/tenex-edge/AGENTS.md), issue `#54`. | [...] Each skill should keep `SKILL.md` short and put volatile details in `reference/` files. For this repo, I’d also add small scripts/resources to `tenex-edge-verification`, such as a command that prints current help, LOC offenders, and known test prerequisites, because command/docs drift is already visible.
